configuration.matrixspy.maxFileSizeMB.de: Maximum MAT file size (in MB) to load. Files larger than this are rejected with a clear error. Range: 1–4096 MB.
configuration.matrixspy.maxDataSize.desc: Deprecated: use matrixspy.maxFileSizeMB instead. Previously controlled max file size in MB.
configuration.matrixspy.maxDataSize.depr: Use matrixspy.maxFileSizeMB instead. This setting is kept for backward compatibility and will be removed in a future release.
configuration.matrixspy.enableImage.desc: Deprecated: this setting has no effect. Image MAT data features are always enabled.
configuration.matrixspy.enableImage.depr: This setting has no effect and is kept for backward compatibility. Image MAT data features are always enabled. It will be removed in a future release.
Custom colormaps defined as key-point arrays. Each colormap is an array of [position, r, g, b] tuples where position is 0.0-1.0 and r,g,b are 0-255. Example: {"myCmap": [[0, 0, 0, 0], [0.5, 255, 0, 0], [1.0, 255, 255, 255]]}
Enable anonymous usage telemetry to help improve MatrixSpy
